shots.prompt: An infinite mirror ocean under a kaleidoscopic neon sky, perfect reflections doubling into fractal symmetry, gentle waves of liquid light rippling outward forever. Serene, hyper-saturated, seamless.
From the mirror surface rise glowing geometric islands that fold and unfold like origami, reflected endlessly, colors bleeding and breathing. Hypnotic, fluid continuous motion.
The ocean inverts into a sky and the sky into an ocean, the horizon dissolving into a breathing kaleidoscope of bioluminescent color. Dreamlike, impossible, smooth.
Camera glides across the mirror ocean into a tunnel of reflected light blossoms, recursive and infinite, melting gently into pure radiant color. Calm, mesmerizing.
